_comment: Pterodactyl egg — YurOTS (Tibia 7.6, modernized). File-based storage (XML accounts/players, OTBM map); no external database. Builds from source on install into the server's file area (config.lua + the whole data/ tree are editable via the file manager / SFTP). Common settings are exposed as variables; leaving one blank keeps your edited config.lua value.
name: YurOTS (Tibia 7.6)
author: noreply@github.com
description: YurOTS, an OpenTibia server for Tibia 7.6 (engine 0.9.4f), modernized to build on current toolchains. File-based storage — ready to run, no external database required.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -e
export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
apt-get update
apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git ca-certificates cmake ninja-build g++ patchelf \
    libxml2-dev libboost-regex-dev
rm -rf /tmp/yurots
git clone --depth 1 --branch "${GIT_REF}" https://github.com/denizkoekden/YurOTS.git /tmp/yurots
cd /tmp/yurots
cmake -S ots -B build -G Ninja -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release
cmake --build build --parallel
cmake --install build --prefix /mnt/server
cp pterodactyl/start.sh /mnt/server/start.sh
cd /mnt/server
mkdir -p lib
ldd YurOTS | awk '/=>/ {print $3}' | while read -r so; do
  case "$(basename "$so")" in
    libc.so*|libm.so*|libpthread.so*|libdl.so*|librt.so*|ld-linux*|libresolv.so*) ;;
    *) cp -vL "$so" lib/ 2>/dev/null || true ;;
  esac
done
patchelf --set-rpath '$ORIGIN/lib' YurOTS
chmod +x YurOTS start.sh 2>/dev/null || true
echo 'YurOTS installed. Default port 7171 (login + game on one port).'

variables.name: Git reference
variables.description: Branch or tag to build (e.g. master, or a tag like v0.9.4).

variables.name: Public IP
variables.description: IP the login server advertises to clients (your node's public IP). Blank keeps config.lua's value.

variables.name: World name
variables.description: Shown in the character list. Blank keeps config.lua's value.

variables.name: World type
variables.description: pvp, no-pvp or pvp-enforced. Blank keeps config.lua's value.

variables.name: Max players
variables.description: Maximum simultaneous players. Blank keeps config.lua's value.

variables.name: Experience rate
variables.description: Experience multiplier (expmul). Blank keeps config.lua's value.
